AuraPlay is a premium offline music player with professional audio quality, advanced equalizer, tube amplifier simulation, and beautiful Material Design. 100% offline вҖ” no internet required. Your music, your privacy.
AuraPlay needs access to your music library to play your songs. Your data never leaves your device.
This app does not collect, store, or transmit any personal data. All music files are accessed locally on your device. No internet connection is required or used.
